fever.description: Fever may indicate a viral or bacterial infection.
fever.advice: Stay hydrated, rest properly, and monitor your temperature regularly.
follow_up: How long have you had the fever?
Do you also have chills or cough?

cough.description: Coughing may result from infection, allergies, or throat irritation.
cough.advice: Drink warm fluids and avoid smoke exposure.
follow_up: Is the cough dry or productive?
How long have you been coughing?

cold.description: Common cold is usually caused by a viral infection.
cold.advice: Rest well, stay hydrated, and consume warm fluids.
follow_up: Do you also have sneezing or sore throat?

headache.description: Headaches can occur due to stress, dehydration, fatigue, or infections.
headache.advice: Rest in a quiet place and stay hydrated.
follow_up: Is the headache severe or mild?
Do you also feel dizziness?

fatigue.description: Fatigue may result from stress, poor sleep, or illness.
fatigue.advice: Ensure proper rest, hydration, and balanced nutrition.
follow_up: How long have you been feeling tired?

sore throat.description: Sore throat is commonly caused by viral or bacterial infections.
sore throat.advice: Drink warm fluids and avoid cold beverages.
follow_up: Do you also have fever or cough?

nausea.description: Nausea may occur due to digestive issues or infections.
nausea.advice: Eat light foods and drink fluids slowly.
follow_up: Have you vomited recently?

vomiting.description: Vomiting can occur due to infections, food poisoning, or digestive issues.
vomiting.advice: Drink small amounts of water frequently to avoid dehydration.
follow_up: How many times have you vomited today?

diarrhea.description: Diarrhea is commonly caused by infection or food contamination.
diarrhea.advice: Stay hydrated and avoid oily foods.
follow_up: Are you experiencing dehydration or weakness?

stomach pain.description: Stomach pain may result from indigestion, infection, or digestive issues.
stomach pain.advice: Eat light meals and avoid spicy foods.
follow_up: Is the pain sharp or dull?

chest pain.description: Chest pain may indicate a serious cardiovascular condition.
follow_up: Does the pain spread to your arm or jaw?

shortness of breath.description: Difficulty breathing may indicate respiratory or cardiac problems.
follow_up: Did the breathing issue start suddenly?

dizziness.description: Dizziness may result from dehydration, low blood pressure, or stress.
dizziness.advice: Sit down, rest, and drink fluids.
follow_up: Did you faint or lose balance?

joint pain.description: Joint pain may occur due to inflammation or injury.
joint pain.advice: Rest the affected area and apply warm compresses.
follow_up: Is there swelling around the joint?

back pain.description: Back pain commonly results from strain, posture issues, or muscle injury.
back pain.advice: Avoid heavy lifting and maintain good posture.
follow_up: Did the pain begin after physical activity?

runny nose.description: Runny nose is common in colds and allergies.
follow_up: Do you also have sneezing or fever?

palpitations.description: Palpitations may occur due to stress, anxiety, or heart rhythm issues.
palpitations.advice: Seek medical advice if symptoms are frequent or severe.
follow_up: Do you also feel chest pain or dizziness?

anxiety.description: Anxiety can cause restlessness, rapid heartbeat, and excessive worry.
anxiety.advice: Practice relaxation techniques and maintain regular sleep.
follow_up: Are you experiencing sleep problems?

depression.description: Depression may cause persistent sadness and loss of interest.
depression.advice: Seek support from a mental health professional.
follow_up: Have you been feeling this way for more than two weeks?

blurred vision.description: Blurred vision may result from eye strain or underlying medical conditions.
blurred vision.advice: Consult a doctor if vision changes are sudden or severe.
follow_up: Did the blurred vision begin suddenly?

symptom_combinations.advice: Monitor your temperature, stay hydrated, and rest properly.
Drink warm fluids and monitor worsening symptoms.

symptom_combinations.condition: Possible food poisoning or stomach infection
symptom_combinations.advice: Drink fluids frequently and avoid heavy meals.
Increase fluid intake and monitor dehydration symptoms.
Rest properly and drink enough water.

symptom_combinations.condition: Possible stress, burnout, or mood-related condition
symptom_combinations.advice: Consider consulting a mental health professional.
Rest well and monitor if symptoms worsen.
